name: Vidalia Onion Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9" x 13" dish with cooking spray.
2. Crumble the package of crackers and spread them evenly in the bottom of the dish.
3. Melt half of the butter and pour it over the crackers.
4. Cut the onions into small pieces.
5. Sauté the onions in light butter until they are tender.
6. Spread the sautéed onions evenly over the crackers.
7. Add salt and pepper to taste.
8. Beat together 4 eggs and 1 1/2 cups milk.
9. Pour the egg and milk mixture over the crackers and onions.
10. Top with grated sharp cheddar cheese.
11. Sprinkle paprika on top of the casserole.
12. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-45 minutes, or until set.
Note: From Roger Martin
